name: Glade Checkers v3 Update
description: Turn-based multiplayer checkers updates via gameManager
code: var s = state; var b = s.board; if (s.gameOver) return s; if (gameManager && gameManager.hasStateUpdate && gameManager.hasStateUpdate()) { var up = gameManager.consumeStateUpdate(); if (up && up.gameState) { s.board = up.gameState.board || s.board; s.turn = up.gameState.currentTurn || s.turn; if (typeof up.gameState.winner !== 'undefined') { s.winner = up.gameState.winner; s.gameOver = up.gameState.winner !== null; } s.selected = null; s.validMoves = []; } } var sz = Math.min(dimensionContext.width, dimensionContext.height) * 0.9; var off = { x: (dimensionContext.width - sz) / 2, y: (dimensionContext.height - sz) / 2 }; var cs = sz / 8; function inB(r,c){return r>=0&&r<8&&c>=0&&c<8;} function getMoves(board, r, c) { var p = board[r][c]; if (!p) return []; var moves = []; var dirs = []; var isK = p >= 3; var side = p === 1 || p === 3 ? 1 : 2; if (isK || side === 1) dirs.push([-1, -1], [-1, 1]); if (isK || side === 2) dirs.push([1, -1], [1, 1]); for (var i=0;i<dirs.length;i++){ var dr=dirs[i][0], dc=dirs[i][1]; var r1=r+dr,c1=c+dc; if(inB(r1,c1)&&board[r1][c1]===0){ moves.push({to:[r1,c1],capture:null}); } var r2=r+2*dr,c2=c+2*dc; if(inB(r2,c2)&&board[r2][c2]===0&&inB(r1,c1)){ var m=board[r1][c1]; if(m!==0){ var ms = (m===1||m===3)?1:2; if(ms!==side) moves.push({to:[r2,c2],capture:[r1,c1]}); } } } return moves; } if (gameManager && gameManager.isMyTurn === false) { s.message = 'Opponent turn...'; return s; } var click = pointerManager.consumeClick ? pointerManager.consumeClick() : null; if (!click) return s; var c = Math.floor((click.x - off.x) / cs); var r = Math.floor((click.y - off.y) / cs); if (r < 0 || r > 7 || c < 0 || c > 7) return s; var me = 1; if (gameManager && gameManager.playerSlot !== null && typeof gameManager.playerSlot !== 'undefined') { me = gameManager.playerSlot === 0 ? 1 : 2; } var pc = b[r][c]; var side = pc === 1 || pc === 3 ? 1 : (pc === 2 || pc === 4 ? 2 : 0); if (s.selected) { for (var i = 0; i < s.validMoves.length; i++) { var mv = s.validMoves[i]; if (mv.to[0] === r && mv.to[1] === c) { if (gameManager && gameManager.sendAction) { gameManager.sendAction({ type: 'movePiece', from: s.selected, to: [r, c] }); s.message = 'Move sent...'; } s.selected = null; s.validMoves = []; return s; } } s.selected = null; s.validMoves = []; } if (side === me) { s.selected = [r, c]; s.validMoves = getMoves(b, r, c); s.message = s.validMoves.length ? 'Select destination.' : 'No legal moves.'; } return s;
